This is four batch files to run to track down problems with LAN:

	nextinfo: To see the computer LAN parameters
	pingtest <MSD IP Address>: Check for communtication with MSD
	rcptest <MSD IP Address>: Check with RCP and MSD
	scq <MSD IP Address>: Get standard response from MSD
____________________________________________________________________________________________

Ping MS Failure

(loopback has succeeded!)
(Ping GC, if present, has succeeded)

Possible causes

1. incorrect IP address
2. no physical connection
3. MSD powered down
4. bootp server not up
4. MSD Controller card failure.
5. PC NIC failure.
6. bad cables.

Solution...

1. run bootp server
2. verify IP and MAC address in bootp manager, leave CAG bootp server up and running.
3. reboot the MSD from the Front Panel Display (Controller/Reboot Controller?)
4. wait 60 seconds for the MSD to complete its bootup
5. verify that the MSD sent a bootp request and that the bootp server delivered an 
   IP address.  Verify that the MSD's MAC address and Bootp's IP are consistent 
   with the instrument configuration in "HP Configuration Editor".
6. run "HP Configuration Editor" and check for the MSD IP address.

If the problem persists...

-1. reinstall/reconfigure the system as an isolated LAN per the installation instructions.

If the problem persists...


if the system was installed and verified by HP and still under warranty, HP will 
replace defective NIC, HUB, or networking cable.   If the system requires 
reconfiguration or network troubleshooting, HP can provide these services for a FEE.

________________________________________________________________________________________

Ping MSD by Name failure

(loopback has succeeded!)
(Ping GC, if present, has succeeded)
(Ping MSD, if present, has succeeded)

If this test fails, the %systemroot%\system32\drivers\etc\hosts does not have 
an entry for the MSD.  

Solution

Reconfigure the instrument in MSCONFIG and execute he Help/Check Networking item again.

Warning

If the %systemroot%\system32\drivers\etc\hosts is updated by an IT (information 
technology) department, it is essential to reconfigure the instrument to ensure 
that the network name and IP address of the MSD is correctly installed.

________________________________________________________________________________________

RPCINFO failure

(loopback has succeeded!)
(Ping GC, if present, has succeeded)
(Ping MSD, if present, has succeeded)
(Ping MSD by Name, if present, has succeeded)

If this failure occurs, it generally implies that

1) IP address is not an MSD
2) MSD Controller card did not bootup completely
3) MSD controller card requires new firmware to be downloaded

Procedure

1) verify that the IP address of the MSD is the same as the IP address .  

If system was configured properly, reboot the MSD Controller and try again.

_________________________________________________________________________________________

SCQ failure

(loopback has succeeded!)
(Ping GC, if present, has succeeded)
(Ping MSD, if present, has succeeded)
(Ping MSD by Name, if present, has succeeded)
(RPCTest has succeeded)

If this fails it typically means that the SICL I/O libraries are not properly installed 
and configured.  Refer to the installation and configuration instructions.

__________________________________________________________________________________________
Typical PCS information in WIN.INI for a Lan-based LC/MS


[PCS]
ReportFontName= 
ReportFontSize=10
Path=C:\HPCHEM
Links=1,2
Link1=HPBSICL,1,15,0,3
UsePoll=Yes
Applications=HP-LC,HP-MS
Instruments=1
REV=7.01.00
Devices=1,2
Device1=2,0,CLUSTER,IP:15.25.205.130,RAW
Device2=2,1,SMARTCARD3,IP:15.25.205.129
Link2=ARPALAN,9100

[PCS,1]
InstType=1050
InstName=Po
WinSize=Normal
Start=Yes
Program=C:\HPCHEM\CORE\HPCORE.EXE
DEBackground=192 192 192
DEChromatogram=255 255 255
DEAxes=0 0 0
DERtimes=0 0 0
DEBaselines=255 0 255
DEChrom1=0 0 255
DEChrom2=255 0 0
DEChrom3=0 128 0
DEAnnotation=0 0 0
DEFrame=255 0 0
DETitle=255 0 255
DEAxesTitle=0 0 0
DECompounds=255 0 255
DEChrom4=255 0 255
DEChrom5=128 128 0
DEChrom6=128 0 128
DEChrom7=0 64 0
DEChrom8=64 128 128
_AUTOPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\CORE\
_EXEPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\CORE\
_DATAFILE$=DEFAULT.D
_METHFILE$=MSEIINLI.M
_DATAPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\DATA\
_INSTPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\
_CONFIGSEQPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\SEQUENCE\
_CONFIGMETPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\METHODS\
_SEQFILE$=SEQ_655.S
_PRODUCT$=MS-LCMS-LC
ADDONS=1
ADDON1=C:\HPCHEM\MS\MSTOP.MAC
Devices=2,1
IV_SEQPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\SEQUENCE\
IV_METHPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\METHODS\
_LIBPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\SPECLIBS\
_METHPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\METHODS\
_SEQPATH$=C:\HPCHEM\1\SEQUENCE\
_DATAFILE1$=FIA_MAN.D
_DATAFILE2$=DEFAULTB.D
MS_TYPE=6
MSCONNECTION=0
MS_ID=2
_DDEOnLine=HPCORE4574
_DATASEQSUBDIR$=BLD655
_LIBFILE$=DEMODAD.UVL
_DDEOffLine=HPCORE42926
_DATASUBDIR$=BLD655
